headline: Spray Foam in Your Loft? Watch This
subheadline: Your mortgage could be at risk

script_body: Major UK lenders are now refusing mortgages on properties with spray foam. If you're selling, remortgaging, or buying — this affects YOU. We remove it safely with full documentation. Free assessment available for England, Wales & Northern Ireland.
caption: 🚨 Spray foam in your loft? WATCH THIS before you try to sell or remortgage. Major lenders are rejecting properties with spray foam. We remove it safely. Free assessment — link in bio.

headline: 5 Signs Your Insulation Is Destroying Your Home
subheadline: Check if any of these apply to you
script_hook: Is your home showing these 5 warning signs?
script_body: 1. Damp patches on interior walls. 2. Black mould in corners. 3. Home feels colder than before. 4. Render cracking outside. 5. No surveyor visited before installation. If 2 or more apply — you likely have a valid claim worth £10k–£50k+.
caption: 🔍 5 signs your insulation was WRONGLY installed. How many apply to YOUR home? If 2+ match, you could have a claim worth £10k–£50k+. Free check — link in bio.

headline: This FREE Insulation Is Costing Homeowners Thousands
script_hook: Your 'free' insulation could be the most expensive thing that ever happened to your home.
script_body: Millions of UK homes had insulation installed free under government schemes. Many were never surveyed. Now homeowners face damp, mould, structural damage — and bills of £10,000–£30,000 to fix it. But if it was wrongly installed, you could claim £10k–£50k+ in compensation.
caption: Your 'free' insulation could be costing you THOUSANDS. 💰 ECO, Green Deal, Warm Front — millions of homes were insulated without proper surveys. You could claim £10k–£50k+. Free check — link in bio.

headline: Stop Blaming Ventilation for Your Damp
subheadline: The real cause might be in your walls
script_hook: Still buying dehumidifiers? Still painting over mould? STOP.
script_body: If damp or mould appeared AFTER insulation was installed, the insulation itself is likely the cause. Cavity wall insulation traps moisture. Spray foam blocks ventilation. The installer could be liable for all removal and repair costs — plus compensation.
caption: 🛑 Stop blaming ventilation for your damp. If it started AFTER insulation was installed, the INSULATION is the problem. Free damage assessment — link in bio.
